name: Trouble in Pacifica
short_description: Explore the Pacifica archipelago, different islands, secrets and villages await you...Earn money by fishing in a fishing mini-game. Hunt down the sea monster with your upgraded boat and save your home!
detailed_description:
Welcome to Pacifica, a magnificent archipelago with spectacular landscapes that invite you to call it home. However, the tranquility of these islands is threatened by a mysterious sea beast...

Pacifica is a world of astonishing diversity, with distinct biomes, unique islands and a rich variety of fish. Some are common, some are exotic, and some are dangerously aggressive. Be careful when casting your hook, but remember: the greater the risk, the greater the reward!

Upgrade your ship, explore Pacifica and discover secrets, quests and more.

Increase the power of your ship with unique upgrades: more ammunition, increased damage, improved endurance and more. Many of these upgrades are available in the store, but others are only unlocked by completing special missions.

Pacifica is full of mysteries waiting to be discovered - explore every corner and find its hidden secrets!

Customize your ship to your style: choose sails, accessories and more to make it truly yours.

The ancient sea monster has awakened, and only with your family's legendary boat will you be able to confront it and put an end to its threat once and for all. Travel through Pacifica and locate the places where it is wreaking havoc.

But be careful: this creature is cunning and powerful, capable of destroying ships with ease. Prepare yourself well, upgrade your boat and dare to face it... and win!

Hunt down the elusive sea monster, defend your home and bring peace back to the islands...
